user.title: Setup Method
user.description: Choose how you want to add your Storz & Bickel device.

data_description.setup_method: Scan looks for powered-on devices in Bluetooth range. Manual entry is useful if scan does not list your device.

scan.title: Select Storz & Bickel Device
scan.description: Found {count} device(s). Select the device you want to add.

data_description.device_address: Pick the MAC address of the vaporizer you want to control.

manual.title: Enter MAC Address
manual.description:
Enter the MAC address of your Storz & Bickel device.

Format: {format}

data_description.device_address: Use the same format as on the device label or your router’s Bluetooth client list (colons or dashes).
data_description.device_name: A label shown in Home Assistant; discovery may replace it with the name from the device.

reconfigure.title: Update device name
reconfigure.description: Change how this device is labeled in Home Assistant. The Bluetooth address does not change.

data_description.device_name: Shown on the device dashboard and in entity names (together with each entity label).

abort.bluetooth_not_available: Bluetooth is not available. Please enable Bluetooth integration.
abort.not_supported: Device is not a supported Storz & Bickel device

no_connectable_bluetooth.title: No connectable Bluetooth adapter
no_connectable_bluetooth.description: Home Assistant did not find a connectable Bluetooth scanner. Automatic scanning may not work until Bluetooth is set up (you can still try manual MAC entry).
